details: The "Vikramaditya Yojana" is a scholarship scheme offered by the Government of Madhya Pradesh. This scheme is presented by the Department of Higher Education, which means it is intended to help students who are pursuing further education after successfully completing Class 12. These scholarship opportunities are available only for candidates belonging to the General category, which is one of the most important aspects of this scheme.
benefits: Annual financial assistance of a maximum of ₹ 2,500/-
eligibility: The applicant must belong to the General category.
He/she must have scored at least 60% or more marks in the Class 12 examination.
The annual family income of the applicant should not exceed INR 1,20,000 (for higher education) and INR 54,000 (for graduation).

online: Step 2: Click New Registration and fill your details.
Step 3: Login with your username and password.
Step 4: Fill the scholarship form with required information.
Step 5: Upload documents and click Submit.

faqs.question: What is Vikramaditya Yojna Scheme ?
faqs.answer: The scholarship will be helpful for the students who are pursuing further education after they have successfully completed their Class 12th.

faqs.question: What are the benefits of the scheme ?
faqs.answer: Financial Assistance will be provided under this scheme.

faqs.question: What is benefits amount under the scheme ?
faqs.answer: Annual financial assistance of a maximum of Rs. 2,500/-

faqs.question: Who can apply for the scheme ?
faqs.answer: The Students who obtained more than 60 percent marks in the 12th board examination.

faqs.question: Is this scheme for General Category students only ?
faqs.answer: Yes, This scheme is only for general category students.

faqs.question: May other state's student apply ?
faqs.answer: No, This is only for Madhya Pradesh state's Student.

faqs.question: What is the minimum marks required in 12th standard ?
faqs.answer: Minimum marks should be 60% in the 12th standard.

faqs.question: Is this scheme only for BPL categories students ?
faqs.answer: Yes, this scheme is only for BPL Categories students.

faqs.question: What is the application process ?
faqs.answer: 1. First applicant needs to register herself. 2. Then log in again with credentials and complete the application process.

faqs.question: What documents are required ?
faqs.answer: 1. Samagra ID. 2. Current college code. 3. Branch code. 4. Recent passport-size photograph. 5. Caste certificate. 6. Income certificate of parents. 7. Resident proof.
